candidates.title: California Secretary of State certified candidate list press release for June 2, 2026 primary

candidates.title: Candidates - June 2, 2026, Consolidated Statewide Direct Primary Election

candidates.title: S.F. Chronicle endorsements for the 2026 California Primary Election
candidates.notes: DuckDuckGo query: San Francisco Chronicle 2026 primary endorsements San Francisco. The endorsement page was preferred over the broader voter-guide page to stay under the capture byte limit and match the source's endorsement role.

candidates.notes: Top public results pointed to third-party endorsement aggregators or other organizations, not a Mission Local-owned artifact.
